mapper.insert: insert into accounts (store_seq, bank_name, account_number, account_name, billing_key, is_active, created_at) values ( #{storeSeq}, #{bankName}, #{accountNumber}, #{accountName}, #{billingKey}, 'Y', Now())
mapper.select: select * from accounts where store_seq = #{storeSeq} and is_active = 'Y' order by account_seq desc limit 4
select count(*) from accounts where store_seq = #{storeSeq} and is_active = 'Y'
mapper.insert: insert into auto_payment_schedule ( store_seq, partner_seq, account_seq, payment_day, is_active, start_date, created_at) values ( #{storeSeq}, #{partnerSeq}, #{accountSeq}, #{paymentDay}, 'Y', #{startDate}, Now() )

insert into payment_cards ( user_seq, store_seq, billing_key, card_company, card_number_masked, card_type, card_name, is_default, is_active, created_at) values ( #{userSeq}, #{storeSeq}, #{billingKey}, #{cardCompany}, #{cardNumberMasked}, #{cardType}, #{cardName}, 'N', 'Y', Now() )
mapper.select: SELECT card_seq AS cardSeq, user_seq AS userSeq, store_seq AS storeSeq, billing_key AS billingKey, card_company AS cardCompany, card_number_masked AS cardNumberMasked, card_type AS cardType, card_name AS cardName, is_default AS isDefault, is_active AS isActive, created_at AS createdAt FROM payment_cards WHERE store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND is_active = 'Y' ORDER BY card_seq DESC
